title: Andrew James Cooking Rings | Set of 4 Stainless Steel Chef Rings for Moulding & Presentation | Includes Food Press & Lifter | Freezer Oven & Dishwasher Safe (4cm x 6cm)
features: COOKING RINGS WITH FOOD PRESS INCLUDED & LIFTER – The Andrew James Chef Moulding Cooking Rings come with a stainless steel food press and lifter, so you can ensure whatever you are making with your chef cooking rings, is pressed perfectly and able to be removed form the cooking rings with ease.

INCLUDES HANDLED FOOD PRESS AND LIFTER -- To help you create the perfect stack weÆve included a food press with a handle that you can use to push down on the food and help compact it into the cylindrical shape.

STAINLESS STEEL, DISHWASHER SAFE -- This 6cm cooking ring set is made from high-quality polished 430 grade stainless steel. It is easy to clean in the dishwasher and you can also use the rings in the oven to cook food.

PERFECT FOR STARTERS, MAINS, & DESSERTS -- Cooking rings can be used for so much more than just posh mashed potato. Try compressed mushrooms with avocado at the heart as a starter, shrimp noodle stacks as a main and mini cheesecakes for dessert.
MANUFACTURER WARRANTY -- Shop with confidence. Your Andrew James Stainless Steel Cooking Ring Set is covered by a manufacturer warranty.
description: 4 COOKING RING PROFESSIONAL SET -- The Andrew James Cooking Ring Set is so versatile, youÆll begin to wonder how you ever got by in the kitchen without it. Use it to shape and present mains and desserts and give bakes a super straight edge.
